ownerOverrides: High-revenue SKUs continue selling while public copy and buyer flow are cleaned.
B2B is inbound/supporting only unless later chosen.
Airtable is frozen/read-only as legacy evidence; Supabase/dashboard is the active operating system for new work.
Supabase is read-only by default for Codex/agents; writes require explicit Pafi approval and must be visibly marked as Pafi-authorized.
Narcis website work is consolidated into one Website Compliance task and is waiting for lawyer opinion; no new site modifications should be executed until counsel gives boundaries.
Urgent AOD9604 correction: website and labels must show 5 mg, not 10 mg.

Ownership update 2026-06-30: Vic owns RUO compliance, allowed website products, affiliate rules, and online-presence rules; Narcis owns tech creation/admin including Hermes Telegram stock management and peptides/supplements protocol agents; Pafi owns products, SKUs, budgeting, and sales workflow.

Chapter model 2026-06-30: Compliance & Online Presence (Vic); Tech/Admin & AI Agents (Narcis); Products, SKUs & Budgeting (Pafi); Purchasing & Logistics (Pafi lead, Vic compliance, Narcis admin); Sales & Marketing (Pafi sales workflow, Vic rules/online presence, Narcis/Dan execution).

gates.name: Compliance & Online Presence
gates.summary: Vic owns RUO compliance, allowed website products, affiliate rules, and online-presence rules. Website compliance waits for lawyer boundaries; Narcis implements approved changes; Pafi owns product/sales implications.

gates.name: Tech/Admin & AI Agents
gates.summary: Narcis owns tech creation/admin, Supabase/dashboard operations, approval register, backups, Hermes Telegram stock-management agent, and peptide/supplement protocol agent.

gates.name: Products, SKUs & Budgeting
gates.summary: Pafi owns product/SKU disposition, pricing/margin, budget, protocol economics, and sales-workflow economics. Vic signs off compliance and Narcis implements admin/site fields.

gates.name: Purchasing & Logistics
gates.summary: Purchasing/logistics remains blocked by SO-04 structured line proof, Ibiza 69-vial in-transit stock, accessory proof/QC, AOD label correction, and Retatrutide premium restock/COA planning.

gates.name: Sales & Marketing
gates.summary: Pafi owns sales workflow; Vic owns marketing/affiliate/online-presence rules; Narcis and Dan execute only inside approved rule sets. Affiliate/referral engine is planned, not active.

gates.name: Cash / Dragos Proof
gates.summary: Dragos provides real balances/proofs; Narcis packages the cash packet into dashboard/evidence format. This remains the single non-Pafi/Vic/Narcis blocker.

tasks.title: Website Compliance
tasks.description: Single consolidated website compliance task for PeptraLabs .com/.ro. No new website modifications should be executed until the lawyer opinion arrives and gives the allowed copy/flow boundaries. Prepare only the correction map and evidence while waiting. Corrections to prepare: affiliate/program pages must remove or pause public commission, override, sub-affiliate, influencer recruitment, passive-income, weekly crypto payout, and earnings-calculator claims unless counsel approves a compliant private policy; peptide calculator and reconstitution/dosing flows must stay gated or removed from public access; high-revenue/high-risk SKU pages continue selling only under the lawyer-approved RUO copy model and must remove treatment, healing, repair, fat-loss, human-use, injection, protocol, dosing, medical-benefit, and before/after style claims; checkout must keep intended-use acknowledgement and rejection/manual-review logic aligned with counsel; CTAs, promo strips, discount language, and support copy must avoid medical-use or aggressive commerce framing; visible page copy, meta titles/descriptions, FAQ schema, JSON-LD, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, AI snippets, and Romanian pages must all match the same approved RUO model; COA/report states must be consistent across product pages, lab-report archive, schema, support macros, and LLM files, using clear states such as verified report, supplier COA, independent COA, no public COA, failed, or not applicable; accessories must remain separated from peptide compliance language and must not imply dosing, injection, sterility, or cold-chain proof beyond evidence. Vic now owns compliance decisions for allowed products on the website, affiliate rules, and online presence; Narcis implements approved technical/site changes; Pafi reviews product/SKU and sales implications.
tasks.acceptance: Blocked until lawyer opinion is received. Before that, Narcis/Pafi may prepare URL-by-URL notes only. After counsel opinion arrives, apply only lawyer-approved changes, record changed URLs and screenshots, keep P0-002 calculator/reconstitution gate and P0-004 checkout acknowledgement as completed controls, and run a post-change scan confirming no banned affiliate/calculator/high-risk medical or passive-income claims remain across .com, .ro, schema, LLM files, checkout, support text, and promo surfaces. Vic signs off the allowed-product/compliance rule before Narcis implements site or online-presence changes.
completedControlsPreserved: P0-002 calculator/reconstitution public gating marked done by Pafi on 2026-06-24
P0-004 checkout intended-use acknowledgement marked done by Pafi on 2026-06-24

tasks.title: Correct AOD9604 website strength from 10 mg to 5 mg
tasks.description: Urgent factual product correction: update AOD9604 website strength from 10 mg to 5 mg everywhere it appears. Check product title, product variant/option, product description, pricing table, cart/checkout display, related product blocks, search/category cards, .com/.ro surfaces, schema/JSON-LD, meta snippets, llms.txt/llms-full.txt, and any support/site text that repeats the strength. This is a factual strength correction, not a lawyer-gated copy rewrite.
tasks.acceptance: AOD9604 displays 5 mg everywhere on public and generated website surfaces; no AOD9604 10 mg references remain except archived evidence; Narcis provides changed URL list and screenshots/search proof.

tasks.title: Re-order AOD9604 labels with 5 mg instead of 10 mg
tasks.description: Narcis and Dragos coordinate the AOD9604 label correction: re-order/reprint labels that say 5 mg instead of 10 mg, update the label/design/order file, and prevent old 10 mg labels from being used on 5 mg stock. Dragos must know which labels are valid before any handoff/delivery.
tasks.acceptance: Proof of 5 mg label reorder/reprint is saved; design/order file says AOD9604 5 mg; any old 10 mg labels are segregated, destroyed, or marked not-for-use; Dragos confirms only 5 mg labels are used going forward.

tasks.title: Create 48h live-state register
tasks.description: Create a simple 48-hour snapshot of what is actually live or not live right now: D2C sales live, ads not running, website compliance waiting for lawyer opinion, high-revenue SKUs continue selling, Dragos collaborator sales not active yet, Supabase/dashboard active, Airtable frozen, accessories waiting for proof/QC. This is a status register, not a freeze.
tasks.acceptance: Each item has state, owner, next action, due date if relevant, and proof/evidence link. The team can open one board and see what is live, blocked, waiting, or ready.

tasks.title: Create red/yellow/green gate scoreboard
tasks.description: Maintain daily gate states for Site, Counsel/Broker, Cash, Supabase/Dashboard, SKU, Accessories, and Dragos. Narcis owns the admin/dashboard operating view; Pafi owns product/sales inputs; Vic owns compliance inputs.
tasks.acceptance: Every gate has state, owner, blocker, proof needed, and next action.

tasks.title: Prepare counsel and customs broker packet
tasks.description: Vic owns the counsel/customs broker packet: live-state summary, current claims/channel examples, SKU/status list, suppliers, import flow, affiliate posture, B2B inbound position, COA/SDS assumptions, and exact go/no-go questions.
tasks.acceptance: Vic has a packet ready to send/review with counsel and customs broker. No legal/import posture is treated as cleared until written opinion/response exists.

tasks.title: Close Dragos cash packet
tasks.description: Dragos provides the real cash/Zen/crypto/receivable/proof data; Narcis helps package it into the dashboard/evidence format. Separate company money owed from any back-pay or personal-stock discussion.
tasks.acceptance: Actual balances, proofs, receivables, and personal-stock debt are recorded cleanly; Pafi is not treated as the owner of this task.

tasks.title: Move active operating ledger into Supabase/dashboard
tasks.description: Supabase/dashboard becomes the active operating system for SKU, batch, stock, orders, payments, COA/SDS, approvals, exceptions, pricing, and evidence links. Airtable remains frozen/read-only legacy evidence. Codex/agents remain read-only in Supabase unless Pafi explicitly approves a write.
tasks.acceptance: No new operational writes go to Airtable. Supabase/dashboard can rebuild current operating state. Any Supabase write by Codex/agents requires explicit Pafi approval and must be visibly marked as Pafi-authorized with timestamp/source.
tasks.completionNote: Marked done by Pafi on 2026-06-24: active operating ledger moved into Supabase/dashboard direction; Airtable remains frozen/read-only legacy evidence.

tasks.title: Airtable/Supabase payment sync completed before Airtable freeze
tasks.description: Narcis reconciled Airtable with Supabase/dashboard and updated payments/transactions before Airtable freeze.
tasks.acceptance: Airtable is now read-only legacy evidence; Supabase/dashboard is the active place for payments, transactions, balances, proofs, and exceptions.
tasks.completionNote: Marked done by Pafi on 2026-06-24; Airtable freeze decision recorded the same day.

tasks.title: Produce 6-month budget and reserve allocation
tasks.description: Split legal/customs/QA, peptide OpCo, accessories, owner repayment, Dragos compensation, COA/testing, inventory, ops, AI/data, and contingency.
tasks.acceptance: Budget states what Vic can commit and which reserves are protected.

tasks.title: Create canonical SKU pricing and margin table
tasks.description: Build table with supplier cost, landed cost, public price, margin, discount/promoter/CAC cap, reorder status, counsel flag, and active copy status. Pafi owns commercial pricing/budget logic; Vic reviews compliance/channel caps; Narcis supports dashboard/admin implementation.
tasks.acceptance: Each SKU has one pricing truth and exception notes.

tasks.title: Build SKU disposition table
tasks.description: Classify every SKU by continue, cleanup, COA needed, margin review, reorder focus, counsel review, or inbound-B2B support. Pafi owns product/SKU disposition; Vic owns allowed-product compliance signoff; Narcis implements dashboard/site/admin status fields.
tasks.acceptance: No SKU status is inferred from memory or chat. Each SKU has both a Pafi commercial status and a Vic compliance/allowed-product status before public promotion or affiliate eligibility.

tasks.title: Confirm Vic accessory proof and low-risk MVP split
tasks.description: Collect first order proof and split accessories into low-risk MVP vs legal-gated items.
tasks.acceptance: Proof saved; copy only covers storage, transport, and organization unless stronger evidence exists.

tasks.title: Freeze Airtable as read-only legacy source
tasks.description: Stop using Airtable for new operational writes. Keep it only as frozen/read-only historical evidence while the active operating layer moves to Supabase/dashboard. Supabase access for Codex/agents is read-only by default.
tasks.acceptance: All new payments, transactions, stock movements, SKU states, approvals, and evidence links belong in Supabase/dashboard, but Codex/agents write only with explicit Pafi approval and visible Pafi-authorized marking; Airtable is referenced only for legacy reconciliation/export.

tasks.title: Rerun Narcis dashboard on canonical Ehsan basis
tasks.description: Dashboard treasury aligns to corrected EUR 5,500 + USD 1,800 Ehsan basis; old ~$6,420 comparison carries the $264.95 offset note if shown.
tasks.acceptance: Dashboard no longer uses stale comparison as current truth.
tasks.completionNote: Marked done by Pafi on 2026-06-24: Narcis dashboard rerun on canonical Ehsan basis completed.

tasks.title: Freeze Airtable and migrate movement/status cleanup to Supabase
tasks.description: Airtable is frozen/read-only; old Airtable movement types and stale exception statuses must be mapped into Supabase, not cleaned in Airtable as the long-term layer.
tasks.acceptance: Team treats Airtable as legacy evidence only; Supabase/dashboard owns movement types, exception status, payments, balances, SKU status, approvals, and evidence links going forward.
tasks.completionNote: Pafi decided on 2026-06-24: freeze Airtable, move to Supabase.

tasks.title: Write Dragos operating contract and local handoff checklist
tasks.description: Contract covers allowed tasks, cannot-do list, approval triggers, evidence rule, AI boundary, escalation, and no off-ledger/direct cash default.
tasks.acceptance: Dragos cannot interpret observation mode as commercial activation.

tasks.title: Build Dragos observation-mode assets
tasks.description: Create contact-map schema, collaborator qualification rubric, field-feedback template, approved/banned phrases, refusal language, and weekly AI report spec.
tasks.acceptance: Dragos can collect field intelligence before commercial activation; no collaborator code or payout draft is active.

tasks.title: Confirm owner settlement after Dragos cash is known
tasks.description: Document Vic net receivable USD 5,622.92, Pafi USD 537.18, Dragos recovery, back-pay payable, and monthly net-sales percentage separately.
tasks.acceptance: Settlement uses actual Dragos cash data, not assumptions.
tasks.completionNote: Marked done by Pafi on 2026-06-24: audit closed; owner settlement confirmation no longer active.

tasks.title: Create approval register for commercial and public changes
tasks.description: Track approvals for public copy, price changes, discount codes, supplier orders, import decisions, live messages, refunds/replacements, and marketplace listings. Narcis owns technical/admin creation of the approval register; Vic owns compliance approvals; Pafi owns product, budget, and sales approvals.
tasks.acceptance: Every mutating action has approval ID, evidence link, timestamp, and owner.

tasks.title: Create daily export and checksum backup
tasks.description: Export dashboard-critical Supabase tables daily and store checksums to detect drift. Reads are allowed; writes/backfills require explicit Pafi approval and Pafi-authorized marking. Narcis owns ongoing admin/technical backup workflow; Codex/Tech supports implementation as needed.
tasks.acceptance: Team can prove whether data changed and when; any agent-created mutation is traceable to explicit Pafi approval.

tasks.title: Integrate Hermes agent into the Telegram group
tasks.description: Narcis integrates the Hermes agent into the shared Telegram group so the team uses one agent for everyone. This is a Narcis-owned coordination/setup task. Scope includes the new Hermes Telegram stock-management agent and the Hermes agent for peptides/supplements protocols.
tasks.acceptance: Hermes is present in the shared Telegram group, the team knows to use that single agent, duplicated bot workflows are retired or marked read-only, and routing/logging rules are documented. Hermes Telegram stock-management and peptide/supplement protocol agent responsibilities are documented, tested in read-only/draft-first mode, and routed to the correct group/admin workflow.

tasks.title: Assign Dan to controlled social media and stiri.peptralabs.ro support
tasks.description: Dan currently handles social media and stiri.peptralabs.ro. Put him into the operating plan for approved social/news execution after the RUO-safe content model is defined. Vic owns the online-presence compliance rule and approved themes; Dan/Narcis execute only inside the approved content and banned-claim boundaries.
tasks.acceptance: Dan has a clear content queue, approval rule, banned-claim checklist, Hermes routing, and no public post/news item goes live with dosing, human-use, treatment, medical-benefit, injection, or passive-income claims. Vic-approved online-presence rules exist before any new public post/news item goes live.

tasks.title: Use Dan for temporary delivery support until Bulgaria stock setup is ready
tasks.description: Dan previously handled deliveries and can cover selected deliveries until the Bulgaria stock/logistics setup is ready.
tasks.acceptance: Any Dan delivery is assigned through the dashboard, tied to a website/order ID, has stock movement and proof recorded, excludes direct/off-ledger cash by default, and includes no product advice or claim-making.

tasks.title: Activate SKU QR codes to direct Janoshik report pages
tasks.description: Activate or generate QR codes for each SKU so scanning the SKU/label QR opens the matching Janoshik report page directly where a Janoshik report exists. Do not point QR codes to a generic homepage, generic lab archive, or wrong SKU/batch. For SKUs without a Janoshik report, use the approved COA absence state instead of creating a misleading QR. Narcis owns QR implementation; Vic confirms compliance/COA wording; Pafi confirms product/SKU mapping where needed.
tasks.acceptance: Every active SKU has a QR status: direct Janoshik report URL verified, approved COA absence state, or blocked pending report. Narcis provides the SKU -> QR target map, changed label/site files if relevant, and scan-test proof for representative QR codes. Public wording uses Janoshik consistently and does not imply human-use safety.

tasks.title: Prepare inbound B2B support packet
tasks.description: No special B2B launch. If someone asks, deliver only with evidence and evaluate how B2B supports RUO positioning. Pafi owns sales workflow; Vic reviews compliance posture; Narcis supports admin/technical flow.
tasks.acceptance: B2B handling is inbound/supporting only and does not create public campaign risk.

tasks.title: Build dummy website-paid order handoff and location notification flow
tasks.description: Narcis builds/tests a dummy paid website-order flow from order paid -> location decision -> notification -> local handoff -> evidence record -> stock movement. The notification must route based on customer delivery location: Ibiza orders notify the Ibiza/local handoff channel; Bulgaria/Bucharest/other warehouse-flow orders notify the Bulgaria/central logistics channel. Include order ID, customer location, product/SKU, paid status, delivery/handoff route, responsible person, required proof, and no medical/product-advice text.
tasks.acceptance: A dummy paid order can be processed without real collaborator activation. The correct Ibiza vs Bulgaria/central notification is selected from customer location, the handoff recipient sees only operational details, stock/evidence records are created or drafted, and the flow can be repeated safely before real use.

tasks.title: Build read-only/draft-first AI agent suite
tasks.description: Build AI helpers that can read the dashboard/Supabase/project context and draft actions or reports, but cannot change records by themselves. Examples: Daily Ops summary, Stock check, Finance check, Compliance check, Procurement draft, Accessories check, Ibiza Network update, and Weekly Business Reporter. Narcis owns tech creation/admin for the agent suite, including stock-management and peptide/supplement protocol workflows; agents remain read-only/draft-first unless explicitly Pafi-authorized.
tasks.acceptance: Each AI helper is read-only by default. Any proposed write, payment change, stock movement, public copy change, order change, or message send must become a draft and wait for explicit approval ID/idempotency key before execution.

tasks.title: Launch accessories site only after proof and policy gates
tasks.description: Launch accesoriipeptide.ro only after proof, QC, copy, landed-cost, and eMAG/Amazon/Noon policy checks. Vic owns accessory/compliance gates and online-presence policy; Narcis supports site/admin implementation after gates pass.
tasks.acceptance: Low-risk SKUs first; no unsupported sterility/cold-chain/dosing/injection claims.

tasks.title: Create monthly budget tracking by operating bucket
tasks.description: Create a monthly budget view grouped by operating buckets: legal/customs/QA, peptide operating company, accessories, owner repayment, AI/data/dashboard, marketing/content, logistics, and contingency. Track planned budget, actual spend, remaining reserve, owner/person responsible, evidence/proof link, and variance.
tasks.acceptance: Dashboard shows budget vs actual by month and bucket, so Pafi/Vic can see how much runway remains and which category is over/under budget.

tasks.title: Resolve Ibiza 69-vial in-transit transfer and recount
tasks.description: Resolve the Bucharest -> Ibiza 69-vial transfer that is deducted from Bucharest and present in Ibiza accounting but not physically arrived according to Pafi. Keep those vials treated as in-transit/not sellable until physical receipt and recount.
tasks.acceptance: Receipt or non-receipt is evidenced; BPC-157 14, TB-500 5, Retatrutide 10, Mots-C 15, GHK-CU 15, and NAD+ 10 are either received/recounted or explicitly marked in-transit/not sellable in the operating view.

tasks.title: Structure SO-04 restock items and purchasing proof
tasks.description: SO-04 is the only open Supabase restock: 250 vials ordered, paid by Dragos via Zen, but restock_items has 0 structured line rows. Build the purchasing proof and line-item breakdown before treating the order as operationally clear.
tasks.acceptance: Supplier/order proof, payment proof, expected SKU/qty breakdown, ETA/status, and structured restock item plan are saved. No agent infers SO-04 SKU contents from legacy reports unless Pafi explicitly authorizes that cross-check.

tasks.title: Prepare Retatrutide premium restock and expanded COA plan
tasks.description: Prepare first/next Retatrutide premium restock using EUR 149/vial list-base only with expanded third-party COA/testing. Normal promo/affiliate cap is 20%; sub-floor discounts require manual approval.
tasks.acceptance: Supplier/lab plan includes HPLC purity, LC-MS identity, assay/content if available, endotoxin LAL, heavy metals, residual solvents, and sterility/bioburden where practical. Vic confirms compliance wording; public language remains RUO/research-only and never says human-use safety.

tasks.title: Build discount, referral, affiliate, and Staff-class engine
tasks.description: Implement the approved discount/referral/affiliate engine structure: affiliate profiles, discount codes, customer discount assignments, product discount policies, order discount lines, affiliate order attribution, affiliate commission lines, and Staff class. Vic owns rules/compliance; Pafi owns sales economics; Narcis owns tech/admin implementation.
tasks.acceptance: Engine is built or implementation-ready with ex-VAT/ex-transport commission basis, no stacking by default, product-line margin gate, 20% default pool/30% ceiling, partial-refund reversal, legacy high-discount review, and no activation before Vic compliance signoff.

tasks.title: Resolve protocol blockers for Libido and Cognition stacks
tasks.description: Resolve missing protocol blockers: Libido is blocked by missing PT-141 final protocol, and Cognition is blocked by missing Selank final protocol. Keep protocol economics separate from customer-use advice.
tasks.acceptance: PT-141 and Selank have final approved protocol-economics rows or remain explicitly blocked. Libido and Cognition stack statuses are updated accordingly, with Vic compliance review and Narcis protocol-agent/admin support.

tasks.title: Backfill structured Supabase transaction references plan
tasks.source: Supabase transaction reference audit 2026-06-28 / chapter reorg 2026-06-30
tasks.description: Create a safe backfill plan for 118/534 transaction-like Supabase rows missing structured references across orders, customer_payments, expenses, restocks, stock_movements, and treasury_transfers. This is a plan first; writes remain Pafi-authorized only.
tasks.acceptance: Backfill plan maps each missing-reference table to reference source, proposed field, evidence link, and write authorization requirement. No write occurs without explicit Pafi authorization and performed_by=API/Pafi agent marking.
